AboutUs.p1: Our goal is to create an ecosystem with a daily global audience of over 1 billion people through social media projects, mobile applications, and various local and international services.
AboutUs.p2: We don’t rely solely on advertisers; our objective is to leverage the power of marketing and audience reach to build our own Brands.
AboutUs.p3: Become part of the Bimark Ecosystem now. Soon, we will have hundreds of brands worldwide and our own currency, allowing us to set our own rules in the market.
AboutUs.p4: If you are interested in becoming a partner, please reach out via the contact details provided on our website.
AboutUs.title: About Us

Hero.subtitle: Become a co-owner of the world's largest social media channels, pages, and projects.
Hero.title: Invest in Digital Assets with

HowItWorks.goal1: Become a co-owner of major online projects such as YouTube channels, Facebook pages, TikTok, Instagram accounts, and mobile applications.
HowItWorks.goal2: Bimark is an ecosystem where every project is interconnected. Every six months you receive bonuses: by leveraging a global audience of over 100 million subscribers, we will create new brands, world-class artists, and produce films. With a multi-million audience, we achieve instant million-scale reach. Each of you will receive a bonus and a stake in these newly created projects.
HowItWorks.goal3: Receive a monthly income of 5-15% thanks to stable advertising payouts from these projects. If your specific project experiences a downturn, the minimum payout is compensated by other projects.
HowItWorks.goalsTitle: Project goals for each of you:
HowItWorks.subtitle: Media assets appreciate every year. Earn 5-15% monthly income through a stable revenue stream for everyone.
HowItWorks.title: The world's first exchange for social media and application shares.
